overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic architecture. The player character crosses streets and walks under overpasses with vibrant pink and red neon signage, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

turning right onto the sidewalk after crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-slicked intersection at night, facing a building with a prominent red neon GUN-O-MAT sign. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk and turns right onto the sidewalk, passing the illuminated storefront.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside an industrial building marked with yellow and black caution stripes. An overhead walkway bridge is visible ahead, and a lone pedestrian walks in the opposite direction. The street has sparse traffic with occasional futuristic vehicles passing by.

concrete and metal transit overpass creating a covered walkway
scattered trash and debris accumulated along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches and enters a covered walkway beneath a transit overpass. Pink neon lights illuminate the left side of the path, and trash is visible along the sidewalk. The scene fades to black at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit covered pedestrian walkway under overpass

events.description: fade in from black continuing under the overpass with prominent pink neon lighting
passing scattered debris and trash along the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: sleek black futuristic vehicle parked along the curb
elevated train or pedestrian overpass with support columns

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered walkway after the fade transition, with bright pink neon lights now dominating the left side. The path is littered with debris, and a futuristic car is parked on the right. The camera approaches an intersection visible at the end of the covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with multiple crosswalks and neon signage

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection with wider visibility
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk at the intersection while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway and crossing the busy intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross
futuristic car driving through the intersection with headlights on

traffic signal showing green walk symbol for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide, open intersection filled with neon signage and moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in blue on the left while a futuristic car drives through the intersection. Multiple digital billboards and storefronts with vibrant neon lighting surround the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street corner through a claustrophobic underpass and back into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a building with a red neon GUN-O-MAT sign before turning right onto a wet concrete sidewalk lined with industrial caution stripes. As the camera moves past a lone pedestrian and sparse futuristic traffic, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, shifting into a covered walkway beneath a transit overpass illuminated by vibrant pink neon and littered with debris. The path continues through this dim corridor, passing a parked futuristic car, before the scene opens up once more as the camera emerges from the shelter. Finally, the view expands into a wide, open intersection filled with digital billboards, moderate pedestrian traffic, and glowing storefronts under the city's nocturnal haze.
